_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify gaps in our understanding of target technology and developing innovative collection approaches.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-K-005 (LS, cosine: 0.486), LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.413).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.527). Shared vocabulary: [approaches]. DCWF-only terms [collection, developing, gaps, identify, innovative, our] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, engineering, findings, methods, novel, operationalize] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.895, R=0.869). P exceeds R by 0.026 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 14 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Identify gaps in our understanding of target technology and developing innovativ" and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.527 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [approaches] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Shared tokens: [approaches]. DCWF-only: [collection, developing, gaps, identify, innovative, our]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, engineering, findings, methods, novel, operationalize].
